reviews.comment:
Hola, pésimo servicio, muy mala atención y muy mala comunicación hacia los clientes. Te hacen limpiar el parabrisas, no te ofrecen pagar con la App, no te ofrecen los puntos, no te ofrecen ticket, ni factura. Sumado a esto, larga fila para cargar combustible,
se nota la diferencia de atención entre   la gente de afuera con la del pueblo.  No recomiendo a nadie el ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Hello, terrible service, very poor customer service, and very poor communication. They make you clean your windshield, they don't offer payment with the app, they don't offer points, and they don't give you a receipt or invoice. On top of that, there's a long line to get fuel.
The difference in service between tourists and locals is noticeable. I don't recommend the ACA to anyone.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Eduardo. La verdad que no se que decirte. Mil disculpas, pero me parece raro que te este sea nuestro servicio.

reviews.comment:
Mejor estación de servicio para cargar nafta.. suele haber menos fila o cola que en la única otra estación que hay en el pueblo. Baños 3 de 5 pero compensa que hay q esperar poco
Best service station to load gasoline. There is usually less queue or queue than in the only other station in the town.  Bathrooms 3 out of 5 but it makes up for the fact that you have to wait a little

(Translated by Google)
Best gas station for filling up. There's usually less of a line than at the only other station in town. The restrooms are 3 out of 5, but the short wait makes up for it.

Good service, if you are an ACA member you show your membership card and they give you a free token for hot water.

reviewReply.comment: Los socios ACA tienen 5% de descuento en combustibles y 10% en el full. Gracias Viviana

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSZ2RUY2l3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre paso por alguna cosa u otra... cambiaria, va no se si cambiaria sino que le daria un cursillo acelerado a los playeros sobre el atencion al cliente y a los chicos de la full... Somos todos clientes pero la atencion al amigo es diferente al que no es amigo!!

(Translated by Google)
I'm always going through something or other... I would change it, well, I don't know if I would change it, but I would give the beach attendants and the guys at the full service a crash course... We're all customers, but the way we treat a friend is different than the way we treat someone who isn't a friend!!
